title: ecbolium repens
intro: Ecbolium repens, also known as creeping ecbolium, is a creeping or trailing plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ecbolium repens include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. In herbal preparations, Ecbolium repens is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
